query:
UPDATE projects SET 
  videoUrl = 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=T3KGtgWEGW0',
  builderDescription = 'Kumar Properties is one of Pune''s most trusted and established real estate developers, founded in 1966. With over 55 years of excellence, they have delivered 140+ projects and created homes for 42,000+ happy families across 36 million sq.ft. Known for their commitment to quality, innovation, and customer-centric approach, Kumar Properties has won numerous awards including ''Developer of the Year''. Their projects are synonymous with premium living and sustainable development.',
  builderLogo = '/images/partners/kumar-properties.png',
  builderEstablished = 1966,
  builderProjects = 140
WHERE id = 3;
